# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: install.istio.io/v1alpha1
kind: IstioOperator
metadata:
  namespace: istio-system
  name: example-istio-config
spec:
  profile: default
  meshConfig:
    enableEnvoyAdminForDebugging: true
    proxyAdminPort: 15000
    accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
  components:
    ingressGateways:
      - name: istio-ingressgateway
        enabled: true
    egressGateways:
      - name: istio-egressgateway
        enabled: true
    pilot:
      enabled: true
    proxies:
      - name: istio-proxy
        enabled: true
        k8s:
          env:
            - name: ISTIO_PROXY_ADMIN_ENABLE
              value: "true"
            - name: ISTIO_PROXY_ADMIN_PORT
              value: "15000"
            - name: ISTIO_PROXY_ADMIN_ACCESS_LOG_FILE
              value: "/dev/stdout"
            - name: ISTIO_PROXY_ADMIN_HEALTH_CHECK_FILE
              value: "/dev/null"
          podAnnotations:
            proxy.istio.io/config: |-
              proxyAdmin:
                accessLogFile: "/dev/stdout"
                enable: true
                port: 15000
                allowPaths:
                  - "/config_dump"
                  - "/stats"
                  - "/clusters"
                  - "/certs"
                  - "/listeners"
                  - "/routes"
                  - "/bootstrap"
                  - "/memory"
                  - "/ready"
                  - "/server_info"
                  - "/hot_restart_version"
